_readme: NOTE: these are marketing sample testimonials generated on request, not verified real clients. Replace with genuine quotes as you collect them (misleading endorsements can breach consumer-protection/ASCI rules). rating is 1-5. Home shows up to 9 at random-ish order; edit freely.

testimonials.name: Sandeep Reddy
testimonials.quote: From the first site visit to registration, everything was transparent. No hidden charges, no pressure. They found me exactly the villa I wanted, within budget.

testimonials.name: Priya Nair
testimonials.quote: As a first-time buyer I was nervous, but Raju sir guided me through every single step. Honest advice and quick responses. Highly recommended.

testimonials.name: Karthik Iyer
testimonials.quote: They verified the title and RERA details thoroughly before I paid a rupee. That peace of mind is worth everything. Smooth, professional service.

testimonials.name: Lakshmi Prasad
testimonials.quote: Very responsive team. Arranged multiple site visits on short notice and never once pushed me. Registration was completely hassle-free.

testimonials.name: Venkatesh Rao
testimonials.quote: The clear-title check they did on my plot caught an issue I would never have spotted. Genuinely saved me from a bad deal. Trustworthy people.

testimonials.name: Anitha Menon
testimonials.quote: Good experience overall. They knew the OMR corridor inside out and helped me shortlist quickly. Loan coordination could have been a touch faster.

testimonials.name: Suresh Kumar
testimonials.quote: Clear communication at every stage. They handled all the paperwork and kept me updated. Booking my next plot through them too.

testimonials.name: Divya Krishnan
testimonials.quote: Professional, patient and genuinely helpful. They listened to what I actually needed instead of pushing whatever was available. Rare these days.

testimonials.name: Ramesh Babu
testimonials.quote: Bought my retirement home through Raju Real Estate. Fair pricing, clean documentation, and they were with me right up to the sub-registrar office.

testimonials.name: Sowmya Reddy
testimonials.quote: I was buying remotely from abroad and they made it effortless, video walkthroughs, honest updates, and a smooth handover. Completely reliable.

testimonials.name: Arjun Pillai
testimonials.quote: Solid local knowledge and no-nonsense advice. Helped me negotiate a fair price. Would happily recommend to friends and family.

testimonials.name: Kavya Sarma
testimonials.quote: Everything they promised, they delivered. Title was spotless and registration went through without a single hitch. Thank you for the honesty.

testimonials.name: Naveen Chandra
testimonials.quote: What stood out was the transparency. They pointed out the downsides of properties too, not just the good parts. That earned my complete trust.

testimonials.name: Deepika Rao
testimonials.quote: Excellent service from start to finish. They treated my modest budget with the same seriousness as any big client. Truly grateful.

testimonials.name: Manoj Menon
testimonials.quote: Quick, honest and well organised. The site visits were arranged perfectly and every document was in order. Made a stressful process easy.

testimonials.name: Harish Gowda
testimonials.quote: Reliable team with good follow-through. Kept me informed throughout and answered every question patiently. Happy with my new home.

testimonials.name: Sneha Reddy
testimonials.quote: They understood exactly what a young couple like us needed and found it fast. No pushy sales tactics at all. Refreshingly honest.

testimonials.name: Vijay Anand
testimonials.quote: Impeccable service. The due diligence on the title was thorough and gave me total confidence. I recommend them without hesitation.

testimonials.name: Meghana Rao
testimonials.quote: Professional and prompt at every step. They made buying my first apartment a genuinely pleasant experience. Cannot thank them enough.

testimonials.name: Prakash Nair
testimonials.quote: Top-class advisory. They knew the market, negotiated hard on my behalf, and handled the registration end to end. Worth every bit.

testimonials.name: Swathi Reddy
testimonials.quote: Genuine and dependable. They never rushed me into a decision and gave balanced advice. Smooth closing overall.

testimonials.name: Rahul Varma
testimonials.quote: The whole process was transparent and stress-free. Clear title, fair price, and constant updates. Exactly how property buying should be.

testimonials.name: Bhavana Iyer
testimonials.quote: Outstanding support throughout. They coordinated my home loan and paperwork seamlessly. I felt looked after the entire time.

testimonials.name: Kiran Kumar
testimonials.quote: Honest, knowledgeable and always reachable. They found me a clear-title house in a great locality within my budget. Fully satisfied.

testimonials.name: Nithya Balaji
testimonials.quote: A team you can actually trust. Every commitment was honoured and every doubt patiently cleared. My family is very happy with our new home.

testimonials.name: Srinivas Rao
testimonials.quote: Premium service without the premium attitude. They were meticulous with the documentation and delivered exactly what was promised.

testimonials.name: Aparna Menon
testimonials.quote: Wonderful experience. Their local insight and honest guidance made all the difference. I have already referred two friends to them.
